rows.label: qev090502_MSG0001
rows.name:
This was a damn massacre...
But where does it leave us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey. You've explored this
region before, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Any idea where Clarissa
and her crew could be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0049
rows.name: Shake Head

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0050
rows.name: Claim that you have no idea.

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0051
rows.name: Deduce

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0052
rows.name:
Say that this looks like
the Growth's work.

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0004
rows.name: I see. Then hear me out as I think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0005
rows.name:
The only thing that could have
done this much damage to a team
with Dolls is the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0006
rows.name:
No indigens would be
capable of such carnage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0007
rows.name:
And if it was the Growth, past experience
suggests they likely took prisoners.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0008
rows.name: What do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0008_2
rows.name:
Shall we head to the nearest
Growth base and affect a rescue?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0009
rows.name:
With our combined skills, we
should have little to fear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yes, this is a fine plan indeed. Now
enough of this lingering—let's move out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0011
rows.name:
True, I can't imagine indigens
would be capable of this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0012
rows.name:
But the Growth? Very possible.
And if so, they may have taken
their prisoners to a nearby base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0013_m
rows.name:
These are the benefits of a
partner with experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0013_f
rows.name:
These are the benefits of a
partner with experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0014
rows.name:
Let's make for the nearest
base. Clarissa's waiting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0015
rows.name:
More Earth aliens. Come to
watch us kill your people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you lay a single finger on
my student, I promise you, I'll
have you begging for death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0017
rows.name:
Beg for death? Gwa ha ha!
Earth alien is funny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0018
rows.name:
Oh, I'm serious as the grave, if
you have the guts to try me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0019
rows.name:
Then come. Save your
friend...if you can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0020
rows.name:
If you make it to me...I
will release her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0021
rows.name:
Don't do it! He killed them all!
He'll never keep his word! He—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0022
rows.name: SILENCE, Earth alien![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0023
rows.name: Aaugh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0024
rows.name:
Believe or not. Choice is yours.
But if you flee, she dies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0025
rows.name: Let's go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0025_2
rows.name:
I'll not see another student of
mine murdered by some xeno animal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ho ho. Look who arrives. Funny Earth
aliens stronger than expected.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_JNK0030
rows.name: Demand

rows.label: qev090502_SEL0031
rows.name:
Insist that the Bias release
Clarissa as promised.

rows.label: qev090502_JNK0040
rows.name: Taunt

rows.label: qev090502_SEL0041
rows.name:
Mock the Bias in order to
draw their attention to you.

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0027
rows.name:
Ahh, yes. We did promise release, didn't
we? Very well. Now she will be freed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0028
rows.name: Silence! Wait your turn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0029
rows.name:
All Earth aliens will be
butchered in time. But first...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0029_02
rows.name: Aaaaah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0030
rows.name:
Ha! So much for show of suffering. Earth
aliens are frail. Die too quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0031
rows.name:
Damn you, xeno scum! Why must
you always be such monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0032
rows.name: Monsters? No. Earth aliens are monsters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0033
rows.name:
Now scream! Scream as we kill you! As
all who stand against Growth scream![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0034
rows.name: I've failed them... Again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0035
rows.name:
Dammit. They're gone... All gone!
All but Reggie stolen from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0036
rows.name:
What good am I? What purpose do I serve
if I can't keep a single promise?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0057
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0058
rows.name:
Ask Boze Rose about the promise
he made to his students.

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0059
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0060
rows.name:
Remind Boze Rose that he has
another student right here.

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0037
rows.name:
Several of my students from the academy
were given spots aboard the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0038
rows.name:
Shortly before it launched, they
invited themselves into my home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0039
rows.name:
One last hurrah before leaving,
they said. And so we talked
and drank until dawn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0040
rows.name:
And as the sun rose, I gave
my word that we would someday
return to Earth together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0041
rows.name:
But the damn xenos killed them all.
First on Earth, and now here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now, I wish only pain and death on
xenos. They can never be forgiven![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0043_m
rows.name:
Yes, of course. And you're as
precious to me as any of the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0043_f
rows.name:
Yes, of course. And you're as
precious to me as any of the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0044
rows.name:
So I make you the same promise
I did to them on the day before
the Whale took flight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0046
rows.name:
No matter what, I shall guard
you with my life. No xeno will
ever take you from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0047
rows.name:
Hmm... Do you think it strange
if I take Clarissa's dog tags?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090502_MSG0048
rows.name:
I just want something of her
to...live on back home.[ST:wait ]
